title: Backtracking, Constraint Propagation, and Branch-and-Bound
description: Search schedules and assignments while proving why pruned branches cannot help. Learners cumulatively produce a bounded combinatorial solver with pruning audit through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define partial assignments, legal extensions, completion, and undo invariants.
Prune only with a condition that cannot remove a valid or better solution.
Use constrained-first and value-order heuristics without confusing speed with correctness.
